title: dianthus pyrenaicus subsp. maritimus
intro: Dianthus pyrenaicus subsp. maritimus, also known as the Pyrenean pink or maritime pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family, native to the western Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dianthus pyrenaicus subsp. maritimus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
